name: Aristocrat Leisure Limited
analysis: ALL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$54.3900. Trade idea: entry A$56.5700, stop A$49.9257, target A$76.5029 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
